title: Amazon ML Summer School 2026
body:
Amazon is running a free ML training program for students, taught by Amazon scientists.

-learn from Amazon scientists working on real ML systems
-covers ML, deep learning, probabilistic models, and practical applications
	
This is for B.Tech / M.Tech / PhD students graduating in 2027 or 2028

⏳ Last date: June 14, 2026 (12 PM IST) — 2 days left
🏆 Amazon SWAGs + official acknowledgement letter + networking with Amazon scientists
🌐 Online
